code: export class UserLiveFeedParser{constructor(){this._data={username:'',figure:'',message:'',type:'',persistent:false};}flush(){this._data={username:'',figure:'',message:'',type:'',persistent:false};return true;}parse(wrapper){try{const username=wrapper.readString();const figure=wrapper.readString();const message=wrapper.readString();const type=wrapper.readString();const persistent=wrapper.readBoolean();this._data={username,figure,message,type,persistent};return true;}catch(e){console.error('[❌] Failed to parse LiveFeed packet:',e);return false;}}get data(){return this._data;}}
